title: Waymo expands pause to four cities as robotaxis keep driving into floods
summary: Waymo's robotaxi service is now suspended in both Atlanta and San Antonio, as the company works to stop its vehicles from driving into flooded roads.

title: SpaceX scrubs first Starship V3 launch just before liftoff
summary: SpaceX fueled the third-generation rocket booster and ship and was just moments away from liftoff, before calling a scrub. It's expected to try again Friday.

title: GitHub confirmed a breach last week that exposed around 3,800 internal repositories. The cause wasn't a zero-day. It was a VS Code extension.
summary: Attackers took over the publisher token for Nx Console, which has about 2.2 million installs. They pushed a malicious JavaScript file to the VS Code Marketplace. title: Who will benefit most from SpaceX IPO? Mostly Elon — and a few from his inner circle
summary: Elon Musk has the largest stake in SpaceX by billions of shares. The other biggest shareholders also have longstanding and deep ties to Musk.

title: How Elon Musk will increase his power through the SpaceX IPO

title: Law enforcement shuts down VPN service used by two dozen ransomware gangs
summary: First VPN promised hackers complete anonymity for their cyberattacks. But Europol said it was able to notify the service’s users that they have now been identified.
